hero.subtitle: Connect with verified specialist doctors for video consultations, book professional home healthcare visits, and access a trusted network of partner hospitals — all in one place.

services.heading: Comprehensive Healthcare Solutions
services.sub: Everything you need for your health, all in one platform.
descs: Connect with verified specialists via secure video calls from anywhere in India.
Professional nursing, physiotherapy, and doctor visits delivered to your home.
Dedicated support for international patients seeking treatment in India.
Tailored health packages and wellness programmes for your organisation.
In-house clinics for residential complexes, with 24-hour doctor and nurse coverage.

reviews.heading: What Our Patients Say
reviews.sub: Real experiences from real patients across India.

how.heading: Book in 4 Simple Steps
how.sub: From registration to consultation in minutes — no paperwork, no waiting rooms.
descs: Sign up with your email or mobile number using a quick OTP — no passwords to remember.
Browse verified specialists by specialty, language, location, or real-time availability.
Pick a convenient date and time slot. Pay securely via Razorpay in under a minute.
Join your video call or receive the doctor at home at the scheduled time.

consult.heading: End-to-End Hospital Consultancy
consult.sub: We support hospitals at every stage — from planning to performance.

trust.heading: Built on Trust & Quality
trust.sub: Every doctor, hospital, and service is independently verified by our clinical team.
descs: All doctors are credential-verified with registration numbers confirmed by our team.
End-to-end encryption on all data. Your health records are never sold or shared.
Specialists across 18+ domains — from cardiology to physiotherapy.
Connect with doctors and hospitals across India from anywhere.
Book consultations from your phone in under 2 minutes. No desktop needed.
24/7 support and real-time doctor availability flags for urgent care needs.

cta.heading: Ready to Take Charge of Your Health?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of patients who trust We Care 4 'all' for their healthcare needs.

disclaimer.heading: Legal Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: We Care 4 ‘all’ is an independent healthcare consultancy and patient coordination service. We do not provide medical advice or treatment, nor do we own or operate any medical facility. All medical services are delivered exclusively by licensed physicians and accredited healthcare institutions chosen by the patient. Treatment outcomes, timelines, and costs are determined solely by the treatment provider. Cost estimates are indicative and non-binding. Professional service fees relate only to coordination and support services and are disclosed separately. No medical outcomes are guaranteed.

hp.subtitle: From specialist video consultations to professional home healthcare — we connect you with verified doctors and hospitals across India.

core.heading: What We Offer
svcDescs: Connect with verified specialists via secure HD video calls from the comfort of your home. Available 7 days a week.
Professional nursing, physiotherapy, doctor visits, ECG, and lab sample collection at your doorstep.
Dedicated support for NRI and international patients seeking treatment in India — from arrival to recovery.
Tailored health packages, doctor access and preventive checkups for your organisation's employees.

specs.heading: 18+ Specialties Available
specs.sub: Our verified doctors cover a wide range of specializations. Find the right expert for your health concern.
descs: Heart disease, hypertension, ECG, echo, interventional cardiology.
Brain, spine, nerve disorders, stroke, epilepsy, Parkinson's.
Bone, joint, spine, sports injuries, joint replacement.
Cancer diagnosis, chemotherapy guidance, oncology referrals.
Eye care, cataract, glaucoma, retina, laser correction.
Ear, nose, throat, sinus, hearing loss, tonsils.
Lungs, asthma, COPD, respiratory infections, sleep apnea.
Diabetes, thyroid, hormonal disorders, metabolic conditions.
Dental care, orthodontics, implants, oral surgery.
Primary care, fever, infections, chronic disease management.
Child health, vaccinations, growth monitoring, neonatal care.
Women's health, PCOS, fertility, pregnancy, menopause.
Mental health, anxiety, depression, therapy, counselling.
Digestive disorders, liver, IBD, colonoscopy referrals.
Kidney disease, dialysis guidance, transplant coordination.
Lab reports, biopsy, blood work interpretation.
Rehabilitation, post-surgery recovery, pain management.
Skin, hair, acne, eczema, cosmetic dermatology.

home.heading: Professional Care at Your Doorstep
home.subtitle: Our trained healthcare professionals visit your home — so you get clinical-grade care without leaving the comfort of your house.
pricingDesc: Post-surgery care, elderly care, medication management
Full consultation with a qualified doctor at home
IV drips, injections administered by trained staff
Blood tests and diagnostics collected at your doorstep
Professional dressing and wound care by trained nurses
stepDescs: Browse our home healthcare services and select what you need — nursing, physio, doctor visit, or diagnostics.
Choose a convenient date and time. We offer morning, afternoon, and evening slots on all days.
Pay securely online. Receive an instant booking confirmation with professional's details.
A verified healthcare professional arrives at your address at the scheduled time.

hero.title: Healthcare at Your
hero.subtitle: Nurses, physiotherapists, lab technicians and caregivers — professional care at home, on your schedule.

overview.intro: Bringing quality healthcare to the comfort of your home, we offer a range of professional home health care services across Chennai. Our expert team delivers personalized, compassionate, convenient, and consistent care right at your doorstep.

physioItems.title: Pain Management
physioItems.desc: Pain therapy to relieve chronic and acute pain.

physioItems.title: Rehabilitation
physioItems.desc: For Stroke, Paralysis, Paraplegia, Parkinson's, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Osteo Arthritis, Muscle Spasm, Muscle Injury, Sports Injury, Geriatric (old age) day-to-day functioning, and Post-surgery recovery.

physioItems.title: Pulmonary Therapy
physioItems.desc: For heart patients and lung-infected patients.

physioItems.title: Pediatric Therapy
physioItems.desc: For Cerebral Palsy, Developmental Delay, Autism, Muscular Dystrophy (DMD, BMD, LGMD, DM1/DM2), and Down Syndrome.

physioItems.title: Neurological Therapies
physioItems.desc: For Stroke, Parkinson's, Spinal Cord Injury, Movement Disorder, and improving balance and function.

otherItems.title: Lab Services
otherItems.desc: Blood and urine sample collection, ECG, X-Ray, and Master Health Check-up — all at home.

otherItems.title: Nursing Care
otherItems.desc: Professional nursing support for daily medical needs at home.

otherItems.title: Attendant Care
otherItems.desc: Trained attendants for day-to-day assistance and support.

otherItems.title: Geriatric Care
otherItems.desc: Dedicated, compassionate care for elderly patients.

descs: Pick the service you need from above
Fill your address and preferred time

patients.heading: Registered Patients
patients.hospitalNote: ℹ️ These signed up via the "Hospital Consultancy" login option to browse/apply for empanelment — they're not real patients. Approved hospital partners get their own account in Hospital Partners, separate from this list.

doctors.heading: Doctors
doctors.serverTimeout: Server taking too long — try refreshing

reviews.heading: Reviews
reviews.hideNote: Hiding a review removes it from the public doctor listing and recalculates that doctor's average rating — it isn't deleted, and can be unhidden any time.

doctorLeave.heading: Doctor Leave
doctorLeave.note: Doctors currently or upcoming on blocked leave. Patients can't book these doctors on these dates.
doctorLeave.none: No doctors currently have leave blocked ✅

refunds.heading: Refunds
refunds.note: Shows up here automatically whenever a paid appointment gets cancelled or declined. "Process Refund" calls Razorpay directly and actually returns the money — it isn't just a status flag.
refunds.none: No refunds pending — nice and clear.
refunds.confirmProcess: This issues a real refund through Razorpay right now. Continue?

payouts.heading: Doctor Payouts
payouts.note: Patients pay into your Razorpay account directly — this is a manual ledger of what's owed to each doctor after a completed, paid appointment. Settling here just records that you've paid them outside the platform (bank transfer, UPI, etc); it doesn't move money automatically.

empanelments.heading: Hospital Empanelments
empanelments.approvedNoResend: ✅ Approved — this hospital already has a login (re-approval doesn't resend credentials).
empanelments.rejectConfirmMessage: The hospital will be emailed that their empanelment application wasn't approved. This can't be undone from here.
empanelments.networkError: Network error — please check your connection and try again.

hospitals.heading: Hospital Partners
hospitals.note: Approved hospitals from the Empanelments tab show up here automatically, with login credentials already emailed. Add a commission record whenever a referral or partnership fee is owed, and mark it received once it's actually been paid.
hospitals.none: No approved hospital partners yet — approve one from the Empanelments tab.
hospitals.agreedAmountLabel: Agreed amount (after discussing pricing with the hospital):
hospitals.confirmRegenerate: This invalidates the hospital's current portal link. Continue?
hospitals.portalLinkCopied:
New portal link copied to clipboard:
{{link}}
hospitals.confirmResetPassword: This generates a new login password and emails it to the hospital — their old password stops working immediately. Continue?
hospitals.confirmMarkPaid: Mark this hospital's subscription as PAID? This will unlock their features immediately.
hospitals.subscriptionMarkedPaid: ✅ Subscription marked as paid — features unlocked!

adminChat.heading: 💬 Chat
adminChat.cardDesc: View all conversations between doctors and send messages to any doctor. Click below to open the full chat interface.

notificationModal.subject: Subject *

notificationModal.warning: ⚠️ This will send to all selected patients. Use carefully.

announcements.heading: Announcements
announcements.note: Shown as a banner at the top of every page — public visitors, patients, doctors, and admin alike. Only one should typically be active at a time; turning a new one on doesn't automatically turn others off.
announcements.messagePlaceholder: e.g. We're closed on 26th January for a public holiday — bookings resume the next day.

sendMessageModal.title: Message Patient

specialties.htmlSnippetError: That looks like an HTML/embed snippet (e.g. Flaticon's attribution code), not an image link. Right-click the actual icon image and "Copy image address" instead — or better, download it and upload it to your own storage.
specialties.uploadCustomIcon: Or upload a custom icon image
specialties.chooseImage: 📤 Choose image (SVG, PNG, JPEG, WEBP — max 1MB)
specialties.iconLicenseNote: If sourcing from an icon library like Flaticon, download the actual icon file (not the attribution/embed code) and check their license — attribution may be required unless you're on a premium plan.
specialties.name: Name *
specialties.none: No specialties yet. Click "Add Specialty" to get started.

notApplied.title: Apply for Hospital Partnership
notApplied.desc: You haven't submitted an empanelment application yet. Once submitted and approved by our team, this tab unlocks your full Hospital Dashboard — profile, photos, subscription, and more.

pending.title: Application Under Review
pending.desc: Your application for {{hospital}} is being reviewed by our team. We'll notify you here and by email once a decision is made — usually within a few business days.

rejected.title: Application Not Approved
rejected.desc: Your application for {{hospital}} wasn't approved this time.

approved.title: You're an Approved Partner!
approved.desc: {{hospital}} is now a {{tier}} partner. Your full Hospital Dashboard — profile, photos, subscription, and everything else — is ready.
